Careers

Want to work with USIS?

US Interior Specialties is a veteran-owned contractor delivering commercial construction, specialty interiors, and field services across the region. If you are ready to join our team, start your application online — it only takes a few minutes to create your account.

Apply now Sign in Sign out Create a different account

How it works

  1. 1
    Create your account

    Register with your email so we can save your progress.

  2. 2
    Complete the hiring checklist

    Employment application, union documents, I-9, and W-4 — finish at your own pace.

  3. 3
    HR review

    Our team reviews your submission and follows up with next steps.

© US Interior Specialties
